mapper.sql: SELECT summary_id, city, data_year, indicator_code, actual_weight, max_value, min_value, max_norm, min_norm, create_time FROM jw_branch_summary
mapper.select: WHERE city = #{city} AND data_year = #{dataYear} ORDER BY indicator_code
WHERE city = #{city} AND data_year BETWEEN #{startYear} AND #{endYear} ORDER BY indicator_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_branch_summary ( city, data_year, indicator_code, actual_weight, max_value, min_value, max_norm, min_norm, create_time ) VALUES ( #{city}, #{dataYear}, #{indicatorCode}, #{actualWeight}, #{maxValue}, #{minValue}, #{maxNorm}, #{minNorm}, now() )

INSERT INTO jw_branch_summary ( city, data_year, indicator_code, actual_weight, max_value, min_value, max_norm, min_norm, create_time ) VALUES ( #{city}, #{dataYear}, #{indicatorCode}, #{actualWeight}, #{maxValue}, #{minValue}, #{maxNorm}, #{minNorm}, now() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_branch_summary WHERE summary_id IN
#{id}
DELETE FROM jw_branch_summary WHERE city = #{city} AND data_year = #{dataYear}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_branch_summary ( city, data_year, indicator_code, actual_weight, max_value, min_value, max_norm, min_norm, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.city}, #{item.dataYear}, #{item.indicatorCode}, #{item.actualWeight}, #{item.maxValue}, #{item.minValue}, #{item.maxNorm}, #{item.minNorm}, now())
mapper.update: UPDATE jw_branch_summary SET indicator_code = #{newCode} WHERE indicator_code = #{oldCode}
